documentation_impact.rationale: The worktree removes duplicate agent entrypoints (root CLAUDE.md symlink, redundant Cursor rule shim, `.github/copilot-instructions.md` symlink) and updates AGENTS, PRD, handbook, workflows, hooks, personas, feature specs, and archives so references stay coherent with `AGENTS.md` as the sole root operating card.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Retires symlinked and mirrored instruction surfaces so `AGENTS.md` is the only repository root operating card; preserves governed-commit policy-compliance staging for structural edits outside docs-only paths.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Preserves traceable documentation and reference stewardship by updating handbook, PRD, CI path filters, and dependent memory surfaces when entrypoints change.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Aligns documented operator and agent entry behavior with a single canonical operating card and bootstrap wording without changing phase-exit authority.
